equipBonuses.name: Power/Defense Boost
equipBonuses.description: +2000 Power if your Defense is higher than your Power. +2000 Defense if your Power is higher than your Defense.

equipBonuses.name: On Daily Use
equipBonuses.description: You lose 25% of your Hit Points over 10 seconds as bleed damage.

equipBonuses.name: Bloodlust
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, you gain 100 Power for 1 minute (Max 25 Stacks).

name: Demogorgon's Girdle of Might
setBonus: 3 of Set: Deal up to 10% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and target.

name: Shard of Orcus' Wand

equipBonuses.name: Conjure Orb
equipBonuses.description: Conjures an orb that pursues nearby foes at random, dealing 147 damage to nearby foes every second. After dealing damage 5 times to any number of foes or after 15 seconds, the sphere explodes dealing 324 damage to nearby foes. Damage dealt by the orb increases as it remains active, up to 250%.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Deal up to 10% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and target.
notes: Artifact Equipment; Recharge Time 140s; No Level Requirement

name: Baphomet's Infernal Talisman
setBonus: 3 of Set: Deal up to 10% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and target.

name: Dusk Ward Armet
setBonus: 1 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor — When not in a party, you regenerate 2000 Hit Points, every 3 seconds. 2 of Set: When in a party: +5,000 Maximum Hit Points, +1% Power, +1% Defense. 3 of Set: When on the Stronghold map: You and your allies gain 5 Movement Speed. This effect does not stack. No effect in Stronghold Siege.

name: Dusk Ward Cuirass
setBonus: 1 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor. 2 of Set: When in a party: +5,000 Max HP, +1% Power, +1% Defense. 3 of Set: Stronghold map +5 Movement Speed.

name: Dusk Ward Couters
setBonus: 1 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor. 2 of Set: party bonuses. 3 of Set: Stronghold bonus.

name: Dusk Ward Cuirass — Defense variant
setBonus: 1 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor. 2 of Set: party bonuses. 3 of Set: Stronghold bonus.
notes: Variant with Defense as primary stat

setBonus: 2 of Set: When you land a Critical Strike you Heal nearby allies for up to that Maximum Hit Points to up to 1000. This effect may only occur every 3 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Vanishing Presence
equipBonuses.description: When struck by a foe you have a 100% chance to vanish for 2.5 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every 60 seconds and does not affect companions.

name: Ring of Reflex Sight +1

equipBonuses.name: Reflexive Sight
equipBonuses.description: When struck by a foe you have a 5% chance to reveal all stealthed foes near you. This effect can only trigger once every 20 seconds and does not affect companions.

source: Prophecy of Madness / Demonic Heroic Encounters

name: Ring of Cowardice +1

equipBonuses.name: Cowardice
equipBonuses.description: When struck from behind by a foe you have a 10% chance to repel your target 10 feet and root your attacker for 2 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every 20 seconds and does not affect companions.

source: Throne of the Dwarven Gods / Demonic Heroic Encounters
